summary: The diff implements a comprehensive visual revamp of the frontend matching REQ-8. All specified components and pages are updated with deep jewel tones (OKLCH color space), refined typography (Cormorant Garamond + DM Sans), polished card styles, smooth hover animations, and consistent dark premium aesthetic. CSS custom properties in index.css and Tailwind tokens in tailwind.config.js are updated. AddListingForm and EditListingForm are not directly shown in the diff but are referenced in the file summaries as updated.

missing_requirements.requirement: Apply changes consistently to AddListingForm and EditListingForm components
missing_requirements.reason: The diff does not include direct content for frontend/src/components/AddListingForm.tsx or frontend/src/components/EditListingForm.tsx. While the file-summaries.txt mentions them as updated, no diff content is shown for these files, making it impossible to verify the aesthetic changes were applied.
